questionHtml: State one abiotic factor that could have determined the distribution of barnacles.
markschemeHtml:
a. exposure/tides/waves ✔

b. temperature ✔

c. surfaces «of attachment» ✔

d. resource availability/nutrients ✔

e. pH ✔

f. light ✔

g. salinity ✔

Do not accept biotic factors eg: “competition or predation”

meta.title: State one abiotic factor that could have determined the distribution of barnacles.
breadcrumbLabels: D4.1.4. Abiotic factors as selection pressures
